subcodes.first_line: O Dhabih! The heart hath been created expressly for the recognition of the Lord of Lords; defile it not with attachment to aught else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ذبیح قلب مخصوص ادراک عرفان رب الأرباب خلق شده او را بآلایش حب غیر میالای
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
